headline: 暑期档预热：痴迷领跑，福尔摩斯小姐3回归
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：新片《痴迷》热度登顶，《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《末日地堡》紧随其后。本周《达顿牧场》《穿普拉达的女王2》等备受期待。未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》《奥德赛》即将上映。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: 'Obsession' tops trending, followed by 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Silo.' This week's highlights include 'Dutton Ranch' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2.' Upcoming: 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' and 'The Odyssey.'

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅1部，市场进入暑期档预热期
industryHighlights.en: Only 1 new movie this week; market enters summer preheat phase

industryHighlights.text: 《达顿牧场》与《龙族》持续占据本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'Dutton Ranch' and 'House of the Dragon' remain trending this week

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档，漫威宇宙新篇章
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' dated, new chapter in Marvel universe

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6：燃烧》预告引恐怖片迷热议
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead 6: Burn' trailer sparks horror fan buzz
